Query.SQL: SELECT C.CASE_NUMBER AS "C.CASE_NUMBER" , C.INSOLVENCY_NUMBER AS "C.INSOLVENCY_NUMBER" , C.ADMIN_CRT_CODE AS "C.ADMIN_CRT_CODE" , CT.NAME AS "CT.NAME" , CT.DISTRICT_REGISTRY AS "CT.DISTRICT_REGISTRY" , C.CASE_TYPE AS "C.CASE_TYPE" , CTYPE.RV_IIT_CODE_1 AS "C.JURISDICTION" , DECODE(CTYPE.RV_IIT_CODE_1,NULL,'CC','HC') AS "CTYPE.JURISDICATION" , C.STATUS AS "C.STATUS" , C.TRANSFER_REASON AS "C.TRANSFER_REASON" , C.TRANS_CRT_CODE AS "C.TRANS_CRT_CODE" , C.TRANS_CASE_TYPE AS "C.TRANS_CASE_TYPE" , TRCT.NAME AS "TRCT.NAME" , TRCT.DISTRICT_REGISTRY AS "TRCT.DISTRICT_REGISTRY" , C.XFER_RECEIPT_DATE AS "C.XFER_RECEIPT_DATE" , C.TRANSFER_STATUS AS "C.TRANSFER_STATUS" , C.DATE_OF_TRANSFER AS "C.DATE_OF_TRANSFER" , C.PREVIOUS_COURT AS "C.PREVIOUS_COURT" , C.DATE_TRANSFERRED_IN AS "C.DATE_TRANSFERRED_IN" , C.CRED_CODE AS "C.CRED_CODE" , C.ORA_ROWSCN AS "C_ORA_ROWSCN" , CT.ORA_ROWSCN AS "CT_ORA_ROWSCN" , CTYPE.ORA_ROWSCN AS "CTYPE_ORA_ROWSCN" , (SELECT DECODE(COUNT(*),0,'N','Y') AS "OUTSTANDING_AE" FROM AE_APPLICATIONS AE WHERE AE.CASE_NUMBER = C.CASE_NUMBER AND (AE.PARTY_FOR_PARTY_ROLE_CODE = 'PT 20 CLMT' OR AE.PARTY_FOR_PARTY_ROLE_CODE = 'PT 20 DEF' OR AE.PARTY_AGAINST_PARTY_ROLE_CODE = 'PT 20 CLMT' OR AE.PARTY_AGAINST_PARTY_ROLE_CODE = 'PT 20 DEF' OR (AE.PARTY_FOR_PARTY_ROLE_CODE = 'CLAIMANT' AND AE.PARTY_FOR_CASE_PARTY_NO > 1) OR (AE.PARTY_FOR_PARTY_ROLE_CODE = 'DEFENDANT' AND AE.PARTY_FOR_CASE_PARTY_NO > 9) OR (AE.PARTY_AGAINST_PARTY_ROLE_CODE = 'CLAIMANT' AND AE.PARTY_AGAINST_CASE_PARTY_NO > 1) OR (AE.PARTY_AGAINST_PARTY_ROLE_CODE = 'DEFENDANT' AND AE.PARTY_AGAINST_CASE_PARTY_NO > 9))) AS "OUTSTANDING_AE" , (SELECT DECODE(COUNT(*),0,'false','true') AS "HAS_NAT_CODED_PARTY" FROM CASE_PARTY_ROLES CPR, PARTIES P, PARTY_ROLES PR, CODED_PARTIES CP WHERE CPR.CASE_NUMBER = C.CASE_NUMBER AND CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = 'SOLICITOR' AND CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = PR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND CPR.PARTY_ID = P.PARTY_ID AND P.PARTY_ID = CP.PARTY_ID AND ( (CP.CODE > 1499 AND CP.CODE < 2000 AND CP.ADMIN_COURT_CODE = 335) OR (CP.CODE > 6999 AND CP.ADMIN_COURT_CODE = 335) ) AND EXISTS ( SELECT NULL FROM CPR_TO_CPR_RELATIONSHIP CPR2CPR WHERE CPR2CPR.CPR_B_CASE_NUMBER = CPR.CASE_NUMBER AND CPR2CPR.CPR_B_PARTY_ROLE_CODE = CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND CPR2CPR.CPR_B_CASE_PARTY_NO = CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO AND CPR2CPR.CPR_A_PARTY_ROLE_CODE = 'CLAIMANT' AND CPR2CPR.CPR_A_CASE_PARTY_NO = 1 )) AS "HAS_NAT_CODED_PARTY" FROM CASES C , COURTS CT , COURTS TRCT , CCBC_REF_CODES CTYPE WHERE C.CASE_NUMBER = ${param.caseNumber} AND C.ADMIN_CRT_CODE = CT.CODE AND TRCT.CODE (+)= C.TRANS_CRT_CODE AND CTYPE.RV_LOW_VALUE = C.CASE_TYPE AND ( CTYPE.RV_DOMAIN = 'CURRENT_CASE_TYPE' OR CTYPE.RV_DOMAIN = 'CASE_TYPE_OBSOLETE_BY_IIT' )

Query.Join: CPR.CASE_NUMBER = ${C.CASE_NUMBER} AND CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = PR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND CPR.PARTY_ID = P.PARTY_ID
